source_text: Arrokuda and Cramorant splash into Pokemon GO during Ultra Unlock: Water Festival! The Ultra Unlock: Water Festival event will take place from August 18, 2026 at 10 am to August 24, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

Arrokuda and Cramorant splash into Pokemon GO during Ultra Unlock: Water Festival! The Ultra Unlock: Water Festival event will take place from August 18, 2026 at 10 am to August 24, 2026 at 8 pm local time.
Rainy Lure Modules will attract Arrokuda Increased chance to encounter Shiny Ducklett and Shiny Dewpider
Rainy Lure Modules will attract Arrokuda Increased chance to encounter Shiny Ducklett and Shiny Dewpider
Rainy Lure Modules will attract Arrokuda
Cramorant, the Gulp Pokemon, will make its Pokemon GO debut in Eggs, the GO Pass, and GO Battle League reward encounters.
During the event, Cramorant will appear in both GO Battle League reward tracks starting at Rank 16. It will appear more frequently in the premium track.
